说一下 guizang PPT Skills 还会继续更新啊。

得益于最近的几个赞助，可以找时间去更新第三套主题了，依旧非常惊艳。

同时，在小红书那个图文卡片部分积累的好经验，也会用到 PPT Skills 的新版里面。

即览的新版已经上传，各位可以去 TestFlight 里面更新新版了。

本次更新内容：
1. 修复了一堆 Bug
2. 同时支持了 iOS 17 和 iOS 18 系统 https://t.co/xLMVKQYy1b

CodePilot v0.55.0 正式版已经更新！

重构完成的正式版：

多执行引擎（Claude Code / 自建 Native / OpenAI Codex）、上下文用量可视化、Codex 账号原生能力全部落地为稳定版，并集中修复了 macOS 视觉与托盘、Windows 安装与交互、服务商型号映射等内测反馈问题。

🆕新增功能 https://t.co/RdK90NRJ5E
详情：https://t.co/wI2cSBZobV

RT @evanyou: I've left most of what I want to say in the VoidZero blog post. But worth repeating:

Thank you @voidzerodev team for trusting…

我知道的所有做AI Agent的团队都很拼，不是老板逼着的，是为了心中理想，所以心甘情愿加班和搞封闭开发👍

有点我好奇的是：Kimi 团队在开发 Kimi Code 的时候，是自家模型 token 用的多还是 Claude 或者 GPT 模型的 Token 用的多呢？ 🤔

如果有条件的话，选你能用的上的最聪明的 2-3 个就够了。只有你很在乎成本的情况下或者要做一些研究工作，才需要去使用其他便宜些的模型。

再聪明的模型一个也不够，因为不够稳定和全面，比如最近 GPT-5.5 就不如 Opus 4.8 稳定，甚至写东西还得退回 Opus 4.6。翻译我还是最喜欢 Gemini 3.1 Pro

A real problem with feeling the acceleration viscerally is that current models are really good and it is hard to feel the vibe difference on most individual tasks with new models, even as AIs continue to increase in ability by large amounts (which they actually are doing).

"As of May 2026, more than 80% of the code we merge into Anthropic’s codebase was authored by Claude."

Matches independent measures. There really is no sign this is slowing down (which doesn't mean there aren't organizational challenges to absorbing this much productivity gain) https://t.co/cNoxQnduKF
From this post, full of other interesting insights: https://t.co/A5yxryBjHv

I think it is really worth reading this piece on RSI at Anthropic.

There is a bit of navel-gazing, some marketing, and a lot of very sincere beliefs about what Anthropic thinks is likely in the near future of AI that you probably want to be aware of. https://t.co/A5yxryBjHv

Hardest part about making educational content about AI is how frequently you have to remake videos. 

So many updates since I made these https://t.co/OuyzvdnSLB

Thoughts about as a long form "content creator" in the age of AI agents.

I think you need to balance: 

1. Agents seeing you as a reputable source
2. The core value of your content is "un-summarizable"

If your content is fully scripted and predictable, even with nice edits,
X is where startups live these days - has your buyers, hires, and investors

The best startup launches on X don’t “go viral” anymore.

They’re engineered.

Founder video. Press timing. Creator waves. Repost armies. Live reply war rooms.

Distribution became its own product category.

What is the main problem do you have right now as an AI creator?

Coding is problem solving. 
Design is problem solving. 
AI is problem solving.

I brought 60 people from X into Adobe Firefly Ambassadors program. It wasn’t easy as I am not in charge of the program and who gets selected. I will keep recommending people from this community. Especially people who are supportive of others and show up every day.
